description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 13 mins. WakaTime shows work across 6 projects, with most of the time in Java, followed by Other and Markdown. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded in the data.
